text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: In fact, it's nothing. I can still run, no problem.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But why? I just need to kiss it better and be on my
way.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Things like this are a part of everyday life back in
my hometown.
choice_data_list:
If you don't take care, it may come back to
haunt you later.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Okay, if you insist. I wouldn't wanna have
to miss a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After tending to her injury, I give Oguri Cap the
rest of the day off to recuperate.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I got hurt like this all the time back when I
used to run in the woods.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Uh, well... maybe it does hurt a little, now that I
think of it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I didn't even notice it earlier. That's not a good
sign.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After tending to her injury, I give Oguri Cap the
rest of the day off to recuperate.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If you told me to leap up onto a cliff, I might
struggle a little, but still...
choice_data_list: What kind of example is that?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's just the sort of solo training I used to
do back in the day. As long as I don't have to do
that, I should be okay to continue.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Come on. Let's give it another go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After tending to her injury, I comply with Oguri
Cap's request to resume training.
